entities.createSql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`x` INTEGER NOT NULL, `y` INTEGER NOT NULL, `syncedAt` INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(`x`, `y`))

indices.name: index_collected_squadrats_syncedAt
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_collected_squadrats_syncedAt` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`syncedAt`)
